Package com.orientechnologies.orient.distributed.context.coordination.topology

Class OTopologyManager

java.lang.Object
com.orientechnologies.orient.distributed.context.coordination.dbs.OWatcher
com.orientechnologies.orient.distributed.context.coordination.topology.OTopologyManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
ONetworkTopology, OTopologyEvents
public class OTopologyManager extends OWatcher implements OTopologyEvents, ONetworkTopology
